overall.description: A third-person game scene following a character in a flowing red dress walking through a stormy, narrow rocky canyon that opens into a foggy wasteland. The character approaches and passes a tall illuminated beacon structure under dark, lightning-filled skies with atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with glowing crystal formations

agents.ego_description: the character walks steadily through the narrow canyon, passing blue crystal formations embedded in the left wall

entered.detail: tall sheer rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall sheer rock face forming the right boundary of the canyon
clusters of glowing blue crystals scattered along the canyon floor and walls
hazy mountain silhouettes visible at the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed canyon passage with steep rock walls on both sides. Glowing blue crystals are scattered along the left wall, and the path ahead leads toward a hazy exit. The atmosphere is dark and stormy with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon exit transitioning to open grassland wasteland

events.description: lightning strikes across the sky as the canyon opens into a wider landscape
exits the narrow canyon into an open grassland area with distant rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon walls recede and the landscape opens up to reveal a vast wasteland

entered.detail: dry grass and vegetation covering the open ground
tall illuminated structure with glowing lights atop a pole, visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: As lightning flashes across the stormy sky, the character emerges from the narrow canyon into an open grassland wasteland. The rock walls fall away to reveal a vast landscape with a tall illuminated beacon structure visible in the distance ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the tall beacon structure that grows larger in the center of the frame

entered.detail: ancient stone wall ruins partially visible on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the open wasteland along a dirt path, approaching the illuminated beacon structure which grows progressively larger. Sparse grass covers the ground and ancient stone ruins become visible on the left as the stormy sky continues to darken.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland with stone ruins and passed beacon

events.description: passing the beacon structure as it moves from center to left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking past the beacon structure and continuing along the path through the open landscape

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes the tall beacon structure, which moves to the left and recedes behind as the journey continues. A low stone wall runs along the left side of the path while the open wasteland stretches ahead under the stormy, lightning-filled sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, rocky canyon into a vast, storm-swept wasteland. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage enclosed by steep rock walls and glowing blue crystals under a dark, hazy sky. As lightning flashes above, the camera emerges from the canyon and the walls fall away to reveal an expansive grassland featuring a tall, illuminated beacon in the distance. The scene then opens further as the character traverses a dirt path past ancient stone ruins, with the beacon growing progressively larger before shifting to the left as the character passes it. Finally, the camera continues forward along a low stone wall, leaving the structure behind while the open wasteland stretches ahead under a lightning-filled sky.
